# Lifecycle Email Retention Baseline

Use this baseline to stabilize retention and reactivation sequences.

## Core Moves

1. Segment by behavior and recency before writing copy.
2. Map trigger cadence to lifecycle events with explicit stop conditions.
3. Include one measurable objective per sequence branch.
